# Project Memory

## Architecture

We use a microservices architecture with Docker containers.
The API gateway handles routing and authentication.
Each service owns its own PostgreSQL database.

## Team Decisions

- Always use TypeScript for new services
- Prefer composition over inheritance
- Use structured logging (JSON format)
- Deploy to staging before production

## Preferences

The user prefers concise, technical responses.
Dark mode is preferred for all UI elements.
Use metric units for measurements.

## Active Projects

Working on the v2 API migration.
The payment module needs refactoring.
Mobile app release planned for Q2 2026.
